title: Modern Paintings
description: Paintings are reduced to perfection for the simple minded.
body:
# Modern Paintings
From this texture pack you can expect
- Sleekness
- Smoothness
- Shallowness
All characteristics of pure perfection.

![Wall resembling a perfect balance between paintings.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71979aa43c4063220b3e6a8194b9dfb1b843bf32_0.webp)

A lovely set of paintings for the smooth brained. This means the target audience for this pack includes:

- you
- and me

![White painting. (thanks to ChristyHsu for the 3d model room)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14b6301e392e4768aa722af6d7f9aab00ce96062_0.webp)

### Perfectly refined pieces of perfection.

Paintings have never looked more absorbant than in this swicked texture pack, some may even go as far as calling these paintings "reflective" in nature. Never has your mind been so pleasantly challenged as when looking at these pieces of perfect art.

![Totally accurate representation of the perfect painting.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/781a3fb52e0a095905d13142cebf3c70ac9235cf_0.webp)
